title: Bat Removal & Exclusion in Westbury, NY | $900 – $2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in Westbury, Long Island. Safe, humane bat control for homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Best Pest Control NYC provides expert bat removal and exclusion services throughout Westbury, Long Island, protecting homes and businesses from bat infestations. Our licensed professionals use humane, effective methods to safely remove bats and prevent their return with comprehensive exclusion solutions. Serving the entire Westbury community, we offer fast response times and guaranteed results.
whyUs: With over a decade of experience serving Long Island communities, our certified wildlife technicians understand the unique challenges Westbury properties face with bat intrusions. We use proven exclusion techniques, offer transparent pricing, and guarantee all our work to give you complete peace of mind.
localContext: Westbury's mix of historic residential neighborhoods near Old Westbury Gardens and commercial properties around The Mall at the Source often experience bat activity, particularly in older attics and commercial buildings with accessible entry points. The tree-lined streets and proximity to wooded areas throughout the village create ideal conditions for bat populations seeking shelter in local structures.

faqs.question: How much does bat removal cost in Westbury?
faqs.answer: Bat removal and exclusion services in Westbury typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the size of the colony, the number of entry points, and the complexity of your property. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Is bat removal in Westbury safe and humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, we follow all New York State regulations for humane bat removal. We use one-way exclusion devices that allow bats to leave naturally but prevent re-entry, ensuring no bats are harmed during the process. We never use poisons or harmful traps.

faqs.question: What does bat exclusion involve for Westbury homes?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive bat exclusion service includes a thorough inspection to identify all entry points, installation of one-way exclusion devices, sealing of all potential entry points with durable materials, attic cleanup if needed, and a warranty on our work to prevent future bat problems.

faqs.question: When is bat removal season in Westbury, NY?
faqs.answer: Bat removal in New York cannot be performed during maternity season (roughly May 1 through July 31) when flightless young are present. The best times for bat exclusion in Westbury are early spring (March-April) or late summer through fall (August-October) when all bats can safely exit.
